sql_preview:
/* =========================================================
   每小时执行脚本：刷新 current + 补字段 + 历史留档（日期+小时）
   ========================================================= */

START TRANSACTION;

/* =========================
   1) 刷新 current 表
   ========================= */

DELETE FROM dwd_mes_wms_current_stock;

INSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_current_stock (
    stock_inst_id,
    top_cat_code,
    mid_cat_code,
    leaf_cat_code,
    sku_code,
    sku_name,
    wh_code,
    wh_name,
    wh_class,
    steel_grade,
    spec,
    surface,
    grade,
    batch_code,
    quantity,
    num,
    out_quantity,
    out_num,
    in_quantity,
    in_num,
    trans_in_quantity,
    trans_in_num,
    trans_out_quantity,
    trans_out_num,
    plan_quantity,
    plan_num,
    disable_quantity,
    disable_num,
    ava_quantity,
    ava_num,
    m_date,
    exp_date,
    `status`,
    created_by,
    created_time,
    modified_by,
    modified_time,
    tenant_id,
    tenant_name,
    lock_quantity,
    lock_num,
    log_id,
    stock_status,
    unique_code,
    last_enter_date,
    weight,
    producer,
    act_height,
    act_width,
    tax_amount,
    amount,
    make_order_num,
    next_machine_code,
    project_number,
    sync_time,
    data_date,
    days,
    r_modified_time,
    iron_loss
)
WITH invalid_parent_batches AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT parent_batch_code
    FROM ods_mes_wms_batch_info
    WHERE `status` = 1
      AND parent_batch_code IS NOT NULL
      AND batch_code <> parent_batch_code
)
SELECT
    cs.stock_inst_id,
    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2) AS top_cat_code,
    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 4) AS mid_cat_code,
    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 6) AS leaf_cat_code,
    cs.sku_code,
    ods_sku.sku_name,
    cs.wh_code,
    ww.wh_name,
    ww.wh_class,
    cs.steel_grade,
    cs.spec,
    cs.surface,
    cs.grade,
    cs.batch_code,
    cs.quantity,
    cs.num,
    cs.out_quantity,
    cs.out_num,
    cs.in_quantity,
    cs.in_num,
    cs.trans_in_quantity,
    cs.trans_in_num,
    cs.trans_out_quantity,
    cs.trans_out_num,
    cs.plan_quantity,
    cs.plan_num,
    cs.disable_quantity,
    cs.disable_num,
    cs.ava_quantity,
    cs.ava_num,
    cs.m_date,
    cs.exp_date,
    cs.`status`,
    cs.created_by,
    cs.created_time,
    cs.modified_by,
    cs.modified_time,
    cs.tenant_id,
    mt.tenant_name,
    cs.lock_quantity,
    cs.lock_num,
    cs.log_id,
    cs.stock_status,
    cs.unique_code,
    cs.last_enter_date,
    cs.ava_quantity weight,
    bi.producer,
    bi.act_height,
    bi.act_width,
    bi.tax_amount,
    bi.amount,
    bi.make_order_num,
    bi.next_machine_code,
    bi.project_number,
    NOW() AS sync_time,
    CASE
        WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)
        ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))
        END AS data_date,
    DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,
    cs.r_modified_time,
    bi.iron_loss
FROM ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs
         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww
              ON cs.wh_code = ww.wh_code
                  AND cs.tenant_id = ww.tenant_id
                  AND ww.`status` = '1'
         JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku ods_sku
              ON cs.sku_code = ods_sku.sku_code
                  AND ods_sku.`status` = '1'
         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi
              ON cs.batch_code = bi.batch_code
                  AND cs.sku_code = bi.sku_code
                  AND cs.steel_grade = bi.steel_grade
                  AND cs.surface = bi.surface
                  AND cs.grade = bi.grade
                  AND cs.spec = bi.spec
                  AND cs.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id
                  AND bi.`status` = 1
         JOIN ods_mes_mdm_tenant mt
              ON cs.tenant_id = mt.tenant_id
                  AND mt.`status` = '1'
         LEFT JOIN invalid_parent_batches ipb
                   ON cs.batch_code = ipb.parent_batch_code
WHERE cs.quantity > 0
  AND cs.ava_quantity > 0
  AND cs.`status` = 1
#   AND cs.te

START TRANSACTION;
DELETE
FROM ads_sc_kc_13
where data_date = current_date;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_13

WITH tmp_ads_sc_kc_13_process1 AS (SELECT cs.stock_inst_id,
                                          SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2)                     AS top_cat_code,
                                          SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 4)                     AS mid_cat_code,
                                          SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 6)                     AS leaf_cat_code,
                                          cs.sku_code,
                                          ods_sku.sku_name,
                                          cs.wh_code,
                                          ww.wh_name,
                                          ww.wh_class,
                                          bi.steel_grade,
                                          bi.spec,
                                          bi.surface,
                                          bi.grade,
                                          cs.batch_code,
                                          cs.quantity,
                                          cs.num,
                                          cs.out_quantity,
                                          cs.out_num,
                                          cs.in_quantity,
                                          cs.in_num,
                                          cs.trans_in_quantity,
                                          cs.trans_in_num,
                                          cs.trans_out_quantity,
                                          cs.trans_out_num,
                                          cs.plan_quantity,
                                          cs.plan_num,
                                          cs.disable_quantity,
                                          cs.disable_num,
                                          cs.ava_quantity,
                                          cs.ava_num,
                                          cs.m_date,
                                          cs.exp_date,
                                          cs.STATUS,
                                          cs.created_by,
                                          cs.created_time,
                                          cs.modified_by,
                                          cs.modified_time,
                                          cs.tenant_id,
                                          cs.lock_quantity,
                                          cs.lock_num,
                                          cs.log_id,
                                          cs.stock_status,
                                          cs.unique_code,
                                          cs.last_enter_date,
                                          bi.weight,
                                          bi.producer,
                                          bi.act_height,
                                          bi.act_width,
                                          bi.tax_amount,
                                          bi.amount,
                                          bi.make_order_num,
                                          bi.next_machine_code,
                                          bi.project_number,
                                          DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,
                                          cs.r_modified_time
                                   FROM with_attr_value a
                                            join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs
                                                 ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id
                                                     AND (a.ATTRIBUTE2 = '*' or a.ATTRIBUTE2 = cs.wh_code)
                                                     AND (a.ATTRIBUTE3 = '*' or a.ATTRIBUTE3 = cs.steel_grade)
                                                     AND (a.ATTRIBUTE4 = '*' or a.ATTRIBUTE4 = cs.sku_code)

DELETE from  ads_gx_cg_04 ;
insert into  ads_gx_cg_04
select
    a.organization_code,
    c.tenant_name organization_name,
    a.month,
    a.num,
    b.num order_num
from
    (
        select
            organization_code,
            organization_name,
            date_format( last_update_date, '%Y-%m' ) month,
            count( 1 ) num
        from
            ods_srm_scc_perf_vendor_asses_form
        where
            order_type = 'pro_a_material'
          and indicator_dimension in ( 'service', 'quality' )
        group by
            organization_code,
            organization_name,
            date_format( last_update_date, '%Y-%m' )
    ) a
        left join ( select org_code, org_name, month, sum( num ) num from ads_gx_cg_06 group by org_code, org_name, month ) b on a.organization_code = b.org_code
        and a.month = b.month
        join ods_mes_mdm_tenant c on  a.organization_code=c.tenant_code  and c.STATUS= 1 ;

                                 SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2)                     AS top_cat_code,

                                 cs.in_num,
                                 cs.trans_in_quantity,
                                 cs.trans_in_num,
                                 cs.trans_out_quantity,
                                 cs.trans_out_num,
                                 cs.plan_quantity,
                                 cs.plan_num,
                                 cs.disable_quantity,
                                 cs.disable_num,
                                 cs.ava_quantity,
                                 cs.ava_num,
                                 cs.m_date,
                                 cs.exp_date,
                                 cs.STATUS,
                                 cs.created_by,
                                 cs.created_time,
                                 cs.modified_by,
                                 cs.modified_time,
                                 cs.tenant_id,
                                 cs.lock_quantity,
                                 cs.lock_num,
                                 cs.log_id,
                                 cs.stock_status,
                                 cs.unique_code,
                                 cs.last_enter_date,
                                 bi.weight,
                                 bi.producer,
                                 bi.act_height,
                                 bi.act_width,
                                 bi.tax_amount,
                                 bi.amount,
                                 bi.make_order_num,
                                 bi.next_machine_code,
                                 bi.project_number,

                                 CASE
                                     WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)
                                     ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))
                                     END                                          AS data_date,
                                 DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,
                                 cs.r_modified_time
                          FROM with_attr_value a
                                   join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs
                                        ON a.ATTRIBUTE1 = cs.WH_CODE
                                            AND a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id
                                            AND a.ATTRIBUTE2 = cs.steel_grade
                                            and cs.stock_status in ('01', '02', '05', '06', '07', '08', '09')

                                            WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)
                                            ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))
                                            END                                          AS data_date,
                                        DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,
                                        cs.r_modified_time
                                 FROM with_attr_value a
                                          join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs
                                               ON a.ATTRIBUTE1 = cs.WH_CODE
                                                   AND a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id
                                                   AND a.A

FROM ads_gx_xs_23_detail where sync_data_date = current_date and hour =hour(now())
;

                                            END                                          AS data_date,
                                        DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,
                                        cs.r_modified_time
                                 FROM with_attr_value a
                                          join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs
